'''Dontal''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] who served aboard the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="XWOSG" />

In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], Dontal was stationed aboard the ''Independence'' and was often seen with fellow [[Rebel pilot/Legends|rebel pilots]] [[Misch'an]] and [[Karka]]. Dontal was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brigia]] during [[Operation Strike Fear]], with [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] noticing the pilot's absence from the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]].<ref name="XWOSG" />
